message:
feat(server): add Tailscale remote-access detection and display

Detect Tailscale IPv4 address at startup via `tailscale ip -4` and
build a remote-access URL (with optional auth token) that is surfaced
in three places:

- Startup banner: new "Remote:" line shown when Tailscale is active
- TUI dashboard: remote URL rendered alongside endpoint/web-ui info
- System health screen: dedicated remote-access banner with
  Tailscale hint, plus a detail line in the diagnostics panel

Also changes the default HTTP listen address from 127.0.0.1 to
0.0.0.0 so the server is reachable over Tailscale (and other
network interfaces) without manual config override.

Supporting changes:
- Add `remote_url: Option<String>` to DashboardSnapshot,
  StartupDashboard, DiagnosticsSnapshot, and BannerParams
- New helpers: detect_tailscale_ip(), build_remote_url()
- Update all test fixtures to include the new remote_url field
- Cargo.lock updated (parking_lot, serde added to a workspace crate)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -642,7 +642,7 @@ impl Default for Config {
             memory_fatal_mb: 8192,    // 8 GB
 
             // HTTP
-            http_host: "127.0.0.1".to_string(),
+            http_host: "0.0.0.0".to_string(),
             http_port: 8765,
             http_path: "/api/".to_string(),
             http_bearer_token: None,
